absolutely.example_en: You are absolutely right about the answer to this question.
absolutely.example_zh: 你對這個問題的答案完全正確。

according.definition: 根據；依照（常與 to 連用）
according.example_en: According to the weather report, it will rain tomorrow.
according.example_zh: 根據天氣預報，明天會下雨。

account.example_en: She opened a new bank account last week.
account.example_zh: 她上星期開了一個新的銀行帳戶。

afford.example_en: We can't afford to buy a new car this year.
afford.example_zh: 我們今年負擔不起買新車。

allergy.example_en: My brother has an allergy to peanuts.

although.example_en: Although it was raining, we still went hiking.
although.example_zh: 雖然下雨，我們還是去健行了。

amazing.example_en: The view from the mountain top was amazing.
amazing.example_zh: 山頂上的景色令人驚嘆。

anytime.example_en: You can call me anytime if you need help.
anytime.example_zh: 如果你需要幫忙，隨時可以打給我。

apart.example_en: The two houses are about ten meters apart.
apart.example_zh: 這兩間房子相隔大約十公尺。

app.example_en: I downloaded a new app to learn English words.
app.example_zh: 我下載了一個學英文單字的新應用程式。

argument.example_en: The two brothers had an argument about the TV remote.
argument.example_zh: 這對兄弟為了電視遙控器起了爭執。

aside.example_en: She stepped aside to let the old man pass.
aside.example_zh: 她讓到一旁讓那位老先生通過。

assembly.example_en: All students gathered in the hall for the morning assembly.
assembly.example_zh: 所有學生在早會時聚集到禮堂。

athletes.example_en: Many athletes trained hard for the championship.
athletes.example_zh: 許多運動員為了冠軍賽努力訓練。

attic.example_en: We found some old photos in the attic.
attic.example_zh: 我們在閣樓裡找到一些舊照片。

award.example_en: She won an award for her science project.

barely.example_en: He barely finished his homework before class started.
barely.example_zh: 上課前他勉強才寫完作業。

became.example_en: She became a doctor after years of hard study.
became.example_zh: 經過多年苦讀後她成為了醫生。

bike.example_en: He rides his bike to school every day.

blink.example_en: She blinked quickly when the light suddenly turned on.
blink.example_zh: 燈突然打開時她快速地眨了眨眼。

blossoms.example_en: The cherry blossoms bloom beautifully every spring.
blossoms.example_zh: 櫻花每年春天都開得很美。

bookstore.example_en: I bought a new novel at the bookstore yesterday.
bookstore.example_zh: 我昨天在書店買了一本新小說。

bully.example_en: Teachers should stop students from bullying their classmates.
bully.example_zh: 老師應該阻止學生霸凌同學。

calculator.example_en: You may use a calculator during the math test.
calculator.example_zh: 數學考試時你可以使用計算機。

campsite.example_en: We set up our tent at the campsite near the lake.
campsite.example_zh: 我們在湖邊的露營地搭起帳篷。

championship.example_en: Our school team won the basketball championship this year.
championship.example_zh: 我們學校的隊伍今年贏得了籃球錦標賽。

charity.example_en: They donated their old clothes to a local charity.
charity.example_zh: 他們把舊衣服捐給當地的慈善機構。

chef.example_en: The chef prepared a delicious meal for the guests.
chef.example_zh: 主廚為客人準備了一頓美味的餐點。

cherry.example_en: My little sister loves eating sweet cherries in summer.
cherry.example_zh: 我妹妹夏天很喜歡吃甜甜的櫻桃。

chores.example_en: Every child in the family has daily chores to do.
chores.example_zh: 家裡每個孩子每天都有家務要做。

cleanliness.example_en: The restaurant is famous for its cleanliness and good food.
cleanliness.example_zh: 這家餐廳以整潔和美食聞名。

clearly.example_en: The teacher explained the grammar rule clearly to the class.
clearly.example_zh: 老師清楚地向全班解釋了這條文法規則。

climbers.example_en: Several climbers reached the top of the mountain safely.
climbers.example_zh: 好幾位登山者安全地到達山頂。

cloudy.example_en: It was cloudy this morning, so we brought umbrellas.
cloudy.example_zh: 今天早上天氣多雲，所以我們帶了雨傘。

code.example_en: You need a special code to enter the building.
code.example_zh: 你需要特殊密碼才能進入這棟大樓。

completely.example_en: I completely forgot about our appointment this afternoon.
completely.example_zh: 我完全忘了我們今天下午的約會。

concert.example_en: We are going to a rock concert this Saturday night.
concert.example_zh: 我們這週六晚上要去看搖滾演唱會。

conditioner.example_en: She uses shampoo and conditioner every time she washes her hair.
conditioner.example_zh: 她每次洗頭都會用洗髮精和潤髮乳。

contest.example_en: He entered a singing contest at his school.
contest.example_zh: 他參加了學校的歌唱比賽。

contrary.definition: 相反（常用於 on the contrary）
contrary.example_en: On the contrary, I think the plan is a great idea.
contrary.example_zh: 恰恰相反，我認為這個計劃很棒。

coworkers.example_en: She often has lunch with her coworkers at the office.
coworkers.example_zh: 她常常和同事在辦公室一起吃午餐。

creative.example_en: The art teacher encourages students to be creative in their drawings.
creative.example_zh: 美術老師鼓勵學生在畫畫時發揮創意。

criticism.example_en: He accepted the criticism and tried to improve his work.
criticism.example_zh: 他接受了批評並試著改進他的作品。

crook.example_en: The police finally caught the crook who stole the jewelry.
crook.example_zh: 警方終於抓到偷珠寶的騙子。

cross.example_en: Look both ways before you cross the street.

crossed.example_en: She crossed the road carefully when the light turned green.
crossed.example_zh: 燈號轉綠時她小心地穿越了馬路。

currently.example_en: He is currently studying for his final exams.
currently.example_zh: 他目前正在準備期末考。

decades.example_en: This old temple has stood here for several decades.
decades.example_zh: 這座古老的寺廟已經在這裡矗立了好幾十年。

defend.example_en: The soldiers worked together to defend their village.
defend.example_zh: 士兵們同心協力保衛他們的村莊。

delivery.example_en: The delivery of the package took three days.
delivery.example_zh: 這個包裹的遞送花了三天。

demanding.example_en: Her new job is demanding but very rewarding.
demanding.example_zh: 她的新工作要求很高，但很有成就感。

despite.example_en: Despite the heavy rain, the game continued as planned.
despite.example_zh: 儘管下著大雨，比賽仍按計畫繼續進行。

detail.example_en: Please read the instructions and pay attention to every detail.
detail.example_zh: 請閱讀說明並注意每個細節。

details.example_en: The teacher gave us more details about the field trip.
details.example_zh: 老師給了我們更多關於校外教學的細節。

differently.example_en: Twins often think and act very differently from each other.
differently.example_zh: 雙胞胎的想法和行為常常彼此截然不同。

disagreement.example_en: The two students had a disagreement about the project plan.
disagreement.example_zh: 這兩位學生對專題計畫有意見分歧。

disease.example_en: Doctors are working hard to cure the disease.
disease.example_zh: 醫生們正努力治療這種疾病。

displays.example_en: The museum displays ancient artifacts from many countries.
displays.example_zh: 這間博物館展示來自許多國家的古文物。

disturbing.example_en: The news about the earthquake was quite disturbing.
disturbing.example_zh: 有關地震的消息相當令人不安。

document.example_en: Please sign this document before you leave the office.
document.example_zh: 離開辦公室前請簽署這份文件。

doing.example_en: What are you doing this weekend with your family?
doing.example_zh: 你這個週末要跟家人做什麼？

drill.example_en: The school held a fire drill this morning.
drill.example_zh: 學校今天早上舉行了消防演習。

dripping.example_en: Water was dripping from the leaking pipe in the kitchen.
dripping.example_zh: 水從廚房漏水的水管滴落下來。

drowning.example_en: The lifeguard rescued a boy who was drowning in the pool.
drowning.example_zh: 救生員救了一個在泳池溺水的男孩。

due.example_en: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
due.example_zh: 由於天氣不佳，班機延誤了。

dynasty.example_en: Students learn about the Tang Dynasty in history class.
dynasty.example_zh: 學生在歷史課學習唐朝。

earthquake.example_en: A strong earthquake shook the city early this morning.
earthquake.example_zh: 今天清晨一場強烈地震搖晃了整個城市。

easily.example_en: She can easily solve this math problem in a minute.
easily.example_zh: 她能在一分鐘內輕易解出這道數學題。

eightieth.example_en: We celebrated my grandfather's eightieth birthday with a big party.
eightieth.example_zh: 我們為祖父的八十歲生日辦了一場盛大派對。

elegant.example_en: She wore an elegant dress to the graduation ceremony.
elegant.example_zh: 她穿了一件優雅的洋裝去參加畢業典禮。

elementary.example_en: My little brother still studies at an elementary school.

employee.example_en: Every employee must attend the meeting on Monday.
employee.example_zh: 每位員工週一都必須參加會議。

endings.example_en: This movie has one of the happiest endings I've ever seen.
endings.example_zh: 這部電影有我看過最快樂的結局之一。

erase.example_en: Please erase the wrong answer and write the correct one.
erase.example_zh: 請擦掉錯誤答案並寫上正確答案。

essay.example_en: We have to write an essay about our summer vacation.
essay.example_zh: 我們必須寫一篇關於暑假的文章。

essays.example_en: The teacher collected all the essays after class.
essays.example_zh: 老師下課後收齊了所有文章。

eventually.example_en: After months of practice, she eventually won the competition.
eventually.example_zh: 經過幾個月的練習，她最終贏得了比賽。

everyone.example_en: Everyone in the class enjoyed the field trip yesterday.
everyone.example_zh: 班上每個人昨天都很享受這次校外教學。

everything.example_en: She packed everything she needed for the camping trip.
everything.example_zh: 她把露營需要的每樣東西都打包好了。

exactly.example_en: I don't know exactly what time the movie starts.
exactly.example_zh: 我不確定電影確切幾點開始。

exception.example_en: Everyone must follow the rules, with no exception.
exception.example_zh: 每個人都必須遵守規則，沒有例外。

exhibit.example_en: The science museum has a new exhibit about space.
exhibit.example_zh: 這間科學博物館有一項關於太空的新展覽。

exhibits.example_en: Visitors can see many interesting exhibits at the art museum.
exhibits.example_zh: 遊客可以在美術館看到許多有趣的展覽品。

expectations.example_en: Her parents have high expectations for her grades.
expectations.example_zh: 她的父母對她的成績有很高的期望。

experiment.example_en: The students did a science experiment about plant growth.
experiment.example_zh: 學生們做了一個關於植物生長的科學實驗。

explanation.example_en: The teacher gave a clear explanation of the new grammar rule.
explanation.example_zh: 老師對新的文法規則做了清楚的解釋。

extent.example_en: I don't know to what extent the plan will succeed.
extent.example_zh: 我不知道這個計畫會成功到什麼程度。

extremely.example_en: The math test today was extremely difficult for most students.
extremely.example_zh: 今天的數學考試對大多數學生來說極度困難。

fabric.example_en: This dress is made of soft, comfortable fabric.
fabric.example_zh: 這件洋裝是用柔軟舒適的布料做的。

fierce.example_en: The two teams had a fierce competition in the final round.
fierce.example_zh: 這兩支隊伍在決賽中展開了激烈的競爭。

files.example_en: She saved all her files on the computer before leaving.
files.example_zh: 她離開前把所有檔案都存到電腦裡。

financial.example_en: The family faced some financial problems last year.
financial.example_zh: 這家人去年遇到了一些財務問題。

floral.example_en: She wore a dress with a beautiful floral pattern.
floral.example_zh: 她穿了一件有美麗花卉圖案的洋裝。

fluently.example_en: He can speak English fluently after years of practice.
fluently.example_zh: 經過多年練習，他能說一口流利的英語。

forecast.example_en: The weather forecast says it will be sunny tomorrow.
forecast.example_zh: 天氣預報說明天會是晴天。

fridge.example_en: There is some leftover pizza in the fridge.
fridge.example_zh: 冰箱裡有一些剩下的披薩。

friendship.example_en: Their friendship has lasted since elementary school.
friendship.example_zh: 他們的友誼從小學開始一直維持到現在。

funding.example_en: The school received extra funding to build a new library.
funding.example_zh: 學校得到額外經費來興建新圖書館。

generation.example_en: My grandparents belong to a very hardworking generation.
generation.example_zh: 我祖父母屬於非常勤奮的一代。

generations.example_en: This recipe has been passed down through many generations.
generations.example_zh: 這道食譜已經流傳了好幾代。

global.example_en: Climate change is a serious global problem today.
global.example_zh: 氣候變遷是現今嚴重的全球問題。

goalkeeper.example_en: The goalkeeper made an amazing save in the final minute.
goalkeeper.example_zh: 守門員在最後一分鐘做出了精彩的撲救。

goodbye.example_en: We waved goodbye to our friends at the airport.
goodbye.example_zh: 我們在機場向朋友揮手道別。

grab.example_en: He quickly grabbed his bag before running out the door.
grab.example_zh: 他衝出門前迅速抓起了背包。

graduated.example_en: My sister graduated from high school last June.
graduated.example_zh: 我姊姊去年六月從高中畢業。

graduating.example_en: The graduating students took a group photo together.
graduating.example_zh: 即將畢業的學生們一起拍了團體照。

graduation.example_en: Our whole family attended my brother's graduation ceremony.
graduation.example_zh: 我們全家都參加了我哥哥的畢業典禮。

grammar.example_en: She studies English grammar every night before bed.
grammar.example_zh: 她每晚睡前都會讀英文文法。

grandchildren.example_en: My grandparents love spending time with their grandchildren.
grandchildren.example_zh: 我的祖父母喜歡和孫子女共度時光。

grandma.example_en: I visit my grandma every Sunday afternoon.
grandma.example_zh: 我每個星期天下午都會去看奶奶。

grandparents.example_en: My grandparents live with us and help take care of me.
grandparents.example_zh: 我的祖父母和我們同住，並幫忙照顧我。

greatly.example_en: Her English skills have greatly improved this year.
greatly.example_zh: 她的英文能力今年大有進步。

halfway.example_en: We stopped for a rest halfway up the mountain.
halfway.example_zh: 我們在爬山爬到一半時停下來休息。

hallway.example_en: Students should not run in the hallway between classes.
hallway.example_zh: 下課時間學生不應該在走廊奔跑。

handmade.example_en: She gave her mother a handmade card for her birthday.
handmade.example_zh: 她送給媽媽一張手工卡片作為生日禮物。

happiness.example_en: Spending time with family brings her great happiness.
happiness.example_zh: 和家人共度時光帶給她極大的幸福。

hardworking.example_en: The hardworking students finished their project ahead of time.
hardworking.example_zh: 那些勤勞的學生提早完成了他們的專題。

harvest.example_en: Farmers celebrate after a successful harvest each autumn.
harvest.example_zh: 農夫們每年秋天豐收後都會慶祝。

heard.example_en: I heard some good news about the school trip this morning.
heard.example_zh: 我今天早上聽到一些關於校外教學的好消息。

heavily.example_en: It rained heavily throughout the whole afternoon.

hesitant.example_en: He was hesitant to answer the difficult question in class.
hesitant.example_zh: 他對於在課堂上回答這個困難問題感到猶豫。

hikers.example_en: Many hikers visit the national park every weekend.
hikers.example_zh: 許多健行者每個週末都會造訪這座國家公園。

homeless.example_en: Volunteers brought food to homeless people in the city.
homeless.example_zh: 志工們為城裡無家可歸的人送去食物。

hook.example_en: He hung his jacket on the hook by the door.
hook.example_zh: 他把外套掛在門邊的鉤子上。

illness.example_en: She stayed home from school because of a sudden illness.
illness.example_zh: 她因為突然生病而請假在家。

indoors.example_en: We stayed indoors because of the heavy thunderstorm.
indoors.example_zh: 因為雷雨很大，我們待在室內。

instantly.example_en: The teacher instantly noticed the mistake on the whiteboard.
instantly.example_zh: 老師立刻注意到白板上的錯誤。

instead.example_en: She didn't watch TV; instead, she read a book.
instead.example_zh: 她沒有看電視，反而讀了一本書。

instructions.example_en: Please follow the instructions carefully before starting the experiment.
instructions.example_zh: 開始實驗前請仔細遵照說明。

intern.example_en: The intern worked hard to learn new skills at the company.
intern.example_zh: 這位實習生在公司努力學習新技能。

issues.example_en: The students discussed environmental issues in class today.
issues.example_zh: 學生們今天在課堂上討論了環境議題。

kindly.example_en: The old man kindly helped the lost child find his way.
kindly.example_zh: 那位老先生親切地幫助迷路的孩子找到路。

laptop.example_en: She brings her laptop to school every day for class notes.
laptop.example_zh: 她每天帶筆電到學校做上課筆記。

laughter.example_en: The classroom was filled with laughter during the funny story.
laughter.example_zh: 教室裡在那個好笑的故事時充滿了笑聲。

led.example_en: The teacher led the students to the museum for a tour.
led.example_zh: 老師帶領學生到博物館參觀。

librarian.example_en: The librarian helped me find the book I needed.
librarian.example_zh: 圖書館員幫我找到了我需要的書。

lifeguard.example_en: The lifeguard watched carefully over the swimmers at the pool.
lifeguard.example_zh: 救生員仔細看顧著泳池裡的游泳者。

likelihood.example_en: There is a high likelihood of rain this weekend.
likelihood.example_zh: 這個週末很有可能會下雨。

logo.example_en: The company changed its logo to look more modern.
logo.example_zh: 這間公司更換了標誌，看起來更現代化。

loudly.example_en: The baby cried loudly in the middle of the night.
loudly.example_zh: 那個嬰兒半夜大聲哭鬧。

luckily.example_en: Luckily, we found a taxi just as it started to rain.
luckily.example_zh: 幸運的是，就在開始下雨時我們找到了一輛計程車。

managed.example_en: She managed to finish her report before the deadline.
managed.example_zh: 她設法在截止期限前完成了報告。

math.example_en: He spends an hour every night studying math.
math.example_zh: 他每晚花一小時讀數學。

meantime.definition: 同時；期間（常用於 in the meantime）
meantime.example_en: Dinner will be ready soon; in the meantime, please wash your hands.
meantime.example_zh: 晚餐馬上就好，這段時間請先洗手。

midday.example_en: The sun is strongest around midday in summer.
midday.example_zh: 夏天正午前後陽光最強烈。

mild.example_en: The weather was mild and pleasant during our trip.
mild.example_zh: 我們旅行期間天氣溫和宜人。

mom.example_en: My mom cooks a delicious breakfast for us every morning.
mom.example_zh: 我媽媽每天早上都會為我們做美味的早餐。

monthly.example_en: Our club holds a monthly meeting to plan activities.
monthly.example_zh: 我們社團每月舉行一次會議來規劃活動。

mostly.example_en: The students are mostly interested in science and math.
mostly.example_zh: 學生們大多對科學和數學感興趣。

mount.example_en: We plan to mount the hill before sunset.
mount.example_zh: 我們計畫在日落前爬上這座山丘。

much.example_en: Thank you very much for helping me with my homework.
much.example_zh: 非常謝謝你幫我做作業。

muddy.example_en: Our shoes got muddy after walking through the field.
muddy.example_zh: 走過那片田地後我們的鞋子沾滿了泥巴。

musical.example_en: She has a lot of musical talent and plays the piano well.
musical.example_zh: 她很有音樂天賦，鋼琴彈得很好。

needless.definition: 不必要的（常用於 needless to say）
needless.example_en: Needless to say, everyone was excited about the summer vacation.
needless.example_zh: 不用說，每個人都對暑假感到興奮。

neighborhood.example_en: There is a nice park in our neighborhood.
neighborhood.example_zh: 我們社區裡有一座漂亮的公園。

nicer.definition: 更好的；更親切的（nice 比較級）
nicer.example_en: This new restaurant is nicer than the one we visited last week.
nicer.example_zh: 這家新餐廳比我們上週去的那家更好。

nicest.definition: 最好的；最親切的（nice 最高級）
nicest.example_en: She is the nicest teacher I have ever had.
nicest.example_zh: 她是我遇過最親切的老師。

nick.definition: 刻痕；危急關頭（常用於 in the nick of time）
nick.example_en: He arrived at the station in the nick of time.
nick.example_zh: 他在最後一刻及時趕到車站。

nobody.example_en: Nobody wanted to answer the teacher's difficult question.
nobody.example_zh: 沒有人想回答老師那個困難的問題。

normal.example_en: It is normal to feel nervous before a big exam.
normal.example_zh: 大考前感到緊張是很正常的。

nowhere.example_en: There was nowhere to sit in the crowded library.
nowhere.example_zh: 擁擠的圖書館裡沒有地方可以坐。

odds.example_en: The odds of winning the contest are very low.
odds.example_zh: 贏得這場比賽的機會非常低。

online.example_en: Many students take online courses after school now.
online.example_zh: 現在很多學生放學後會上線上課程。

opposed.definition: 反對的（常用於 opposed to）
opposed.example_en: Some parents are opposed to too much homework for young children.
opposed.example_zh: 有些家長反對給年幼孩子太多作業。

ornaments.example_en: We hung colorful ornaments on the Christmas tree.
ornaments.example_zh: 我們在聖誕樹上掛了色彩繽紛的裝飾品。

outdated.example_en: Our computers at school are quite outdated and slow.
outdated.example_zh: 我們學校的電腦相當過時又很慢。

outdoor.example_en: The school organized an outdoor activity for all students.
outdoor.example_zh: 學校為全體學生安排了一項戶外活動。

overtime.example_en: My father often works overtime to finish his projects.
overtime.example_zh: 我爸爸常常加班完成他的專案。

owing.definition: 由於；因為（常用於 owing to）
owing.example_en: The trip was canceled owing to the typhoon.
owing.example_zh: 這趟旅行因颱風而取消了。

paperwork.example_en: She spent the whole afternoon doing paperwork at the office.
paperwork.example_zh: 她整個下午都在辦公室處理文書工作。

partly.example_en: The delay was partly caused by bad weather.
partly.example_zh: 這次延誤有部分是天氣不好造成的。

per.example_en: The ticket costs two hundred dollars per person.
per.example_zh: 這張票每人要價兩百元。

performing.example_en: The students are performing a play at the school festival.
performing.example_zh: 學生們正在校慶表演一齣戲劇。

permanent.example_en: He finally got a permanent job after months of searching.
permanent.example_zh: 經過幾個月的找工作，他終於得到了一份正職工作。

permission.example_en: She asked her teacher for permission to leave early.
permission.example_zh: 她向老師請求提早離開的許可。

person.example_en: He is a kind person who always helps his classmates.
person.example_zh: 他是個總是幫助同學的好心人。

personality.example_en: She has a cheerful and friendly personality.
personality.example_zh: 她有著開朗友善的個性。

personally.example_en: Personally, I think the new rule is a good idea.
personally.example_zh: 就我個人而言，我認為這項新規定是個好主意。

phone.example_en: Please turn off your phone before the movie starts.
phone.example_zh: 電影開始前請關掉你的手機。

podcasts.example_en: She listens to English podcasts on her way to school.
podcasts.example_zh: 她上學途中會聽英語 podcast 節目。

politely.example_en: The boy politely thanked the librarian for her help.
politely.example_zh: 那個男孩有禮貌地感謝圖書館員的幫忙。

possibility.example_en: There is a possibility that the game will be canceled due to rain.
possibility.example_zh: 這場比賽有可能因下雨而取消。

postman.example_en: The postman delivers letters to our street every morning.
postman.example_zh: 郵差每天早上都會把信送到我們這條街。

postponed.example_en: The outdoor concert was postponed because of the storm.
postponed.example_zh: 這場戶外音樂會因暴風雨而延期了。

presentation.example_en: Our group gave a presentation about recycling in class.
presentation.example_zh: 我們這組在課堂上做了一份關於回收的簡報。

quietly.example_en: The students walked quietly through the library.
quietly.example_zh: 學生們安靜地走過圖書館。

rarely.example_en: He rarely eats fast food because he prefers home-cooked meals.
rarely.example_zh: 他很少吃速食，因為他比較喜歡家常菜。

rate.example_en: The success rate of the new program is very high.
rate.example_zh: 這項新計畫的成功率非常高。

recipe.example_en: My mom shared her favorite cookie recipe with me.
recipe.example_zh: 我媽媽和我分享了她最喜歡的餅乾食譜。

reduce.example_en: We should reduce the amount of plastic we use every day.
reduce.example_zh: 我們應該減少每天使用塑膠的量。

regularly.example_en: She exercises regularly to stay healthy and strong.
regularly.example_zh: 她定期運動以保持健康強壯。

relationships.example_en: Good relationships with classmates make school life more enjoyable.
relationships.example_zh: 和同學有良好的關係讓校園生活更愉快。

relaxing.example_en: Listening to soft music is very relaxing after a long day.
relaxing.example_zh: 漫長的一天後，聽輕柔的音樂非常放鬆。

relieved.example_en: She felt relieved after passing the difficult exam.
relieved.example_zh: 通過那場困難的考試後，她感到鬆了一口氣。

remained.definition: 仍然是；保持（remain 過去式）
remained.example_en: The old bridge remained standing after the strong earthquake.
remained.example_zh: 那座舊橋在強震後仍然屹立不搖。

rescue.example_en: Firefighters worked quickly to rescue the trapped cat.
rescue.example_zh: 消防員迅速行動以救出受困的貓咪。

reserve.example_en: We need to reserve a table at the restaurant for tonight.
reserve.example_zh: 我們需要為今晚在餐廳訂一張桌子。

retrospect.definition: 回顧；回想（常用於 in retrospect）
retrospect.example_en: In retrospect, I should have studied harder for the test.
retrospect.example_zh: 回想起來，我當初應該更努力準備考試。

rid.definition: 擺脫；除去（常用於 get rid of）
rid.example_en: She wants to get rid of the old clothes in her closet.
rid.example_zh: 她想把衣櫃裡的舊衣服清掉。

runners.example_en: Hundreds of runners joined the city marathon this year.
runners.example_zh: 今年有數百名跑者參加了城市馬拉松。

sadness.example_en: She felt a deep sadness when her pet dog passed away.
sadness.example_zh: 她的寵物狗過世時，她感到深深的悲傷。

safely.example_en: The bus driver got all the students home safely.
safely.example_zh: 公車司機安全地把所有學生送回家。

sake.definition: 緣故；利益（常用於 for the sake of）
sake.example_en: He studied hard for the sake of his future career.
sake.example_zh: 他為了未來的事業努力讀書。

schoolwork.example_en: She finishes her schoolwork before watching TV every evening.
schoolwork.example_zh: 她每天晚上會先完成學校功課才看電視。

shelter.example_en: The hikers found shelter under a big tree during the storm.
shelter.example_zh: 暴風雨時，健行者在一棵大樹下找到了避難處。

skip.example_en: You should never skip breakfast before school.
skip.example_zh: 上學前你絕對不應該跳過早餐。

skipping.example_en: Skipping meals is not good for your health.
skipping.example_zh: 不吃正餐對你的健康不好。

slipped.example_en: He slipped on the wet floor and hurt his knee.
slipped.example_zh: 他在濕滑的地板上滑倒，弄傷了膝蓋。

slowly.example_en: The old man walked slowly across the busy street.
slowly.example_zh: 老先生緩慢地穿過繁忙的街道。

smartphone.example_en: Almost every student in class has a smartphone now.
smartphone.example_zh: 現在班上幾乎每個學生都有智慧型手機。

snowstorm.example_en: The flight was canceled because of the heavy snowstorm.
snowstorm.example_zh: 這班機因為強烈暴風雪而取消了。

spill.example_en: Be careful not to spill your juice on the carpet.
spill.example_zh: 小心別把果汁灑在地毯上。

spite.definition: 儘管（常用於 in spite of）
spite.example_en: In spite of the rain, the festival was still held outdoors.
spite.example_zh: 儘管下雨，慶典仍然在戶外舉行。

spot.example_en: This quiet corner of the park is my favorite spot to read.
spot.example_zh: 公園這個安靜的角落是我最喜歡看書的地方。

stock.example_en: The store ran out of stock of the popular toy.
stock.example_zh: 這家店那個熱門玩具的庫存賣完了。

stole.example_en: Someone stole her bicycle from the school parking lot.
stole.example_zh: 有人從學校停車場偷走了她的腳踏車。

stolen.example_en: The police found the stolen laptop two days later.
stolen.example_zh: 警方兩天後找到了被偷的筆電。

storage.example_en: We keep old furniture in the storage room.
storage.example_zh: 我們把舊家具放在儲藏室裡。

stress.example_en: Too much homework can cause a lot of stress for students.
stress.example_zh: 太多作業會給學生帶來很大的壓力。

stressful.example_en: Exam week is always the most stressful time of the semester.
stressful.example_zh: 考試週總是學期中壓力最大的時候。

strict.example_en: Our math teacher is strict but very fair to everyone.
strict.example_zh: 我們的數學老師很嚴格，但對每個人都很公平。

summarize.example_en: Please summarize the story in three sentences.
summarize.example_zh: 請用三個句子總結這個故事。

summit.example_en: They finally reached the summit after a long, hard climb.
summit.example_zh: 經過漫長艱辛的攀爬，他們終於到達了山頂。

sunrise.example_en: We woke up early to watch the beautiful sunrise.
sunrise.example_zh: 我們很早起床欣賞美麗的日出。

sunset.example_en: The sky turned orange and pink during sunset.
sunset.example_zh: 日落時天空變成了橘色和粉紅色。

surgery.example_en: My uncle had surgery on his knee last month.
surgery.example_zh: 我叔叔上個月做了膝蓋手術。

teammate.example_en: She passed the ball to her teammate during the game.
teammate.example_zh: 她在比賽中把球傳給了隊友。

temper.example_en: He tried hard to control his temper during the argument.
temper.example_zh: 爭論時他努力控制自己的脾氣。

tend.definition: 傾向於（常用於 tend to）
tend.example_en: Students tend to feel nervous before a big exam.
tend.example_zh: 學生在大考前往往會感到緊張。

texted.example_en: She texted her mom to say she would be home late.
texted.example_zh: 她傳簡訊告訴媽媽她會晚點回家。

thunderstorm.example_en: A sudden thunderstorm forced us to cancel the picnic.
thunderstorm.example_zh: 突如其來的雷雨迫使我們取消了野餐。

tourism.example_en: Tourism is an important part of the island's economy.
tourism.example_zh: 觀光業是這座島嶼經濟的重要一環。

tourists.example_en: Many tourists visit the old temple every weekend.
tourists.example_zh: 許多觀光客每個週末都會參觀這座古老的寺廟。

translate.example_en: Can you translate this sentence into Chinese for me?
translate.example_zh: 你能幫我把這句話翻譯成中文嗎？

tricky.example_en: This grammar question is a bit tricky for beginners.
tricky.example_zh: 這個文法問題對初學者來說有點棘手。

truly.example_en: I am truly grateful for all your help this year.
truly.example_zh: 我真心感謝你今年給予的所有幫助。

tv.example_en: We watched a nature documentary on TV last night.
tv.example_zh: 我們昨晚在電視上看了一部自然紀錄片。

twins.example_en: The twins look so similar that people often confuse them.
twins.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎長得太像了，大家常常認錯人。

uncomfortable.example_en: The chair was too hard and made him feel uncomfortable.
uncomfortable.example_zh: 這張椅子太硬了，讓他感到不舒服。

underdog.example_en: Everyone cheered for the underdog team in the final match.
underdog.example_zh: 大家都在決賽為那支處於劣勢的隊伍加油。

unkind.example_en: It was unkind of him to laugh at his classmate's mistake.
unkind.example_zh: 他嘲笑同學的錯誤是很不友善的行為。

unless.example_en: We won't go hiking unless the weather improves.
unless.example_zh: 除非天氣好轉，否則我們不會去健行。

unlocked.example_en: She unlocked the door and walked into the empty house.
unlocked.example_zh: 她打開門鎖，走進空蕩蕩的房子。

upset.example_en: She was upset because she lost her favorite pen.
upset.example_zh: 她因為弄丟了最喜歡的筆而感到難過。

upsetting.example_en: It was upsetting to see the injured bird on the ground.
upsetting.example_zh: 看到受傷的鳥躺在地上令人難過。

victims.example_en: Volunteers brought food and water to the earthquake victims.
victims.example_zh: 志工們為地震受害者送去食物和水。

virtue.example_en: Honesty is considered an important virtue in our family.
virtue.example_zh: 誠實在我們家被視為重要的美德。

volume.example_en: Please turn down the volume of your music at night.
volume.example_zh: 晚上請把音樂音量調小。

volunteers.example_en: Many volunteers helped clean up the beach last weekend.
volunteers.example_zh: 上個週末許多志工幫忙清理了海灘。

worse.example_en: The traffic today is even worse than yesterday.
worse.example_zh: 今天的交通比昨天還糟。

worst.example_en: This was the worst storm we have had in ten years.
worst.example_zh: 這是我們十年來遇過最嚴重的暴風雨。

zone.example_en: Please slow down; this is a school zone.
zone.example_zh: 請減速，這裡是學校區域。

grandpa.example_en: We spent the weekend at grandpa's house in the countryside.
grandpa.example_zh: 我們在鄉下爺爺家度過了週末。

mayor.example_en: The mayor announced a new plan for the city park.
mayor.example_zh: 市長宣布了城市公園的新計畫。
